title: Verify Numerical Reasoning
desc: Measures the ability to make correct decisions or inferences from numerical or statistical data.

title: Verify Verbal Reasoning
desc: Measures the ability to evaluate the logic of various kinds of arguments.

title: OPQ32 (Occupational Personality Questionnaire)
desc: Provides a clear, simple framework for understanding the impact of personality on job performance.

title: Verify Inductive Reasoning
desc: Measures the ability to draw inferences and understand the relationships between various concepts.

title: Verify Deductive Reasoning
desc: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions based on information provided.

title: Coding Simulator
desc: Evaluates candidate's coding skills in multiple programming languages.

title: Contact Center Simulation
desc: Assesses an individual's ability to handle customer service scenarios effectively.
